---
title: "Catharine of Aragon and the Sources of the English Reformation. By Albert Du Boys. Edited from the French, with notes, by Charlotte M. Yonge, author of “The Heir of Redclyffe” &c. &c.. 2 vols"
---

## Catharine of Aragon and the Sources of the English Reformation. By Albert Du Boys. Edited from the French, with notes, by Charlotte M. Yonge, author of “The Heir of Redclyffe” &c. &c.. 2 vols

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1881
**Genre:** Edited translation
**Format:** Edited book

**Publisher:** London : Hurst and Blackett, 13 Great Marlborough Street.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
